Technical validation confirms that critical API implementations—specifically Consumes / Verify payment_id, order_id and razorpay_signature (Standard and Custom Checkout), Fetch status of Payment_id and Subscription_id, Consumes Error Codes—are fully operational. While some specific checks may be N/A depending on the flows, the payment infrastructure for UPI and Cards is robust, supported by fully integrated webhooks for real-time event handling and standard mechanisms. With all reviewed security protocols and payment configurations verified as "Done", the integration is stable and optimized for live transaction processing.
